text: What animal's fingerprints are so similar to humans that they can confuse forensic teams?

text: Which planet in our solar system has a day longer than its year?

text: Bananas are naturally slightly what?

text: Which civilization built the pyramids of Giza?

text: Who was the first Emperor of Rome?

text: Who is famous for the quote "I came, I saw, I conquered"?

text: A farmer has 17 sheep and all but 9 run away. How many are left?

text: What gets wetter the more it dries?

text: Which country is currently a permanent member of the UN Security Council?
